expected_steps: clarify supported Markdown subset and dependency policy
create small CLI project scaffold with package module, README and tests
define input/output contract for source md path and destination rtf path
implement markdown-to-RTF conversion with escaped text and basic heading/list emphasis support
handle missing input, invalid extension and overwrite policy explicitly
add fixture-based tests for conversion and CLI behavior
run project-scoped tests and produce usage example
acceptance_criteria: CLI accepts input and output paths
tests do not require external services
all tests run from generated project root
